{{Infobox location
| name = Syrillia
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Syrillia]] is a planet with fire that feeds on doubt.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c22">''The Captain'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Syrillia]] is a planet that is a legendarily exclusive resort.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c20">''The Engineer'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Syrillia]] is a location where cloud-surfing can be performed.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c55">''The Engineer'', chapter 55</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Settlements]]
